tool_args.label: Kings Hwy Bus Lane Segments CB 11
tool_args.raw_text: Bus lane segments in CB 11: 1. Bay Pkwy to W 12 St (westbound), 2. W 10 St to W 7 St (eastbound), 3. W 8 St to W 5 St (westbound), 4. Van Sicklen St to McDonald Ave (eastbound). Bus lanes in effect 7-10 AM & 4-7 PM. Serve all buses, emergency vehicles, and right turns.

payload.description: Four bus lane segments along Kings Hwy in CB 11: (1) Bay Pkwy to W 12 St westbound, (2) W 10 St to W 7 St eastbound, (3) W 8 St to W 5 St westbound, (4) Van Sicklen St to McDonald Ave eastbound. Part-time bus lanes 7-10 AM and 4-7 PM. Serve all buses, emergency vehicles, and right turns.

tool_args.label: Cropsey Ave at Bay 37 St intersection improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Concrete refuge for pedestrians, new concrete bus boarding island, painted curb extension, daytime bus layover space (9A-5P), overnight parking, expanded median tips and shorter crossings, consistent travel lane widths.

payload.location_text: Cropsey Ave at Bay 37 St and Harway Ave, Brooklyn
payload.description: Concrete refuge for pedestrians, new concrete bus boarding island, painted curb extension, daytime bus layover space (9A-5P) with overnight parking, expanded median tips and shorter crossings, consistent travel lane widths

tool_args.label: Kings Hwy pedestrian safety improvements

payload.description: New painted pedestrian refuge spaces replacing large striped medians to provide more visible refuge for pedestrians crossing the street
